versions.version_description: A simplified version that is easy to play on guitar.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Just Called To Say I Love You

recommended.version_description: Hello, This was made to be as accurate as possible. These are the closest to the studio version, and if you want to have less barre chords , put a capo on 2nd fret and transpose down 2 steps.

content:
Part-time lover by Stevie Wonder

Album: In Square Circle (1985)


Capo 1th fret.

(Original Key: [ch]Bbm[/ch])


[Intro]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch],
[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch], [ch]Am7[/ch], [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]


[Interlude]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 Da da da da, da da da da,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Da da da da da, da da da da.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 Da da da, da da da da, da da da da da.[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Call up, ring once hang up the phone, to let me know made it home;[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't want nothing to be wrong, with part-time lo-vers.[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
If she's with me I'll blink the lights, to let you know tonight's the night,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
For me and you; my part-time lo-ver.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]C9[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
 We are, undercover passion on the run.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F#m7b5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Cha-sing love, up against the su  -u   -u-un.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]C9[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]F/G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
 We are strangers by day, lovers by night.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm6[/ch]                   [ch]Esus[/ch]
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
If I'm with friends and we should meet, just pass me by; don't even speak.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
 Know the word's "dis-creet", with part-time lo-vers.[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
But if there's some emergency; have a male friend to ask for me,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
So then she won't peek it's really you; my part-time lo-ver.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]C9[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
 We are, undercover passion on the run.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F#m7b5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Cha-sing love, up against the su  -u   -u-un.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]C9[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]F/G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
 We are strangers by day, lovers by night.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm6[/ch]                   [ch]Esus[/ch]
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right.[/tab]


[Interlude]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 Da da da da, da da da da,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Da da da da da, da da da da.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]
 Da da da, da da da da, da da da da da.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]C9[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
 We are, undercover passion on the run.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F#m7b5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Cha-sing love, up against the su  -u   -u-un.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]C9[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]F/G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
 We are strangers by day, lovers by night.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm6[/ch]                   [ch]Esus[/ch]
Knowing it's so wrong, but feeling so right.[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I've got some-thing that I must tell; last night some-one rang our doorbell,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
And it was not you; my part-time lo-ver.[/tab]


[Verse 4]

[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And then a man called our exchange, but didn't want to leave his name.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em7[/ch]                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I guess that two can play the game; of part-time lo-vers.[/tab]


[Coda]

[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
You and me; part-time lov-ers.[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
But, she and he; part-time lov-ers.[/tab]

(Fade)



(Chord Diagrams)


   [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]C9[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 x02210  320003  x03210  022030  xx0211  355333  x3233x  x33211

   [ch]F/G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F#m7b5[/ch]    [ch]Dm6[/ch]    [ch]Esus[/ch]

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 303211  x32010  x02013  022000  202210  xx0201  022200


Tabbed by Joel from cLuMsY, Bristol, England, 2004 (clumsyband@hotmail.com)
